SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
App
Primary class for global variables, main and common methods.
App.State
 
DiskMark
Tracks and records progress as a disk read or write is being executed
DiskMark.MarkType
 
DiskRun
Stores information about the results of a single disk write/read test
DiskRun.BlockSequence
 
DiskRun.IOMode
 
DiskWorker
Execute disk benchmarking as a Swing-compliant thread (only one of these threads can run at once.) Cooperates with Swing to provide and make use of interim and final progress and information, which is also recorded as needed to the persistence store, and log.
EM
Provides a static factory method for EntityManager objects.
Gui
Creates a graph and fills it with data and results from current run, and allows for easy access by storing a reference to the GUI
MainFrame
Creates the MainFrame with methods that enable easy control
RunPanel
 
SelectFrame
GUI window that allows the user to select directory for running the benchmark.
Util
Utility methods for jDiskMark
